description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a tan-colored body and black accents on the barrel, magazine, and stock. The upper receiver is flat and includes a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, while the lower receiver is angular and robust. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard, and the pistol grip is integrated into the lower receiver. The stock is fixed and extends straight back, providing stability for aiming. The barrel is standard length and capped with a black muzzle device, likely a flash hider. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, durable firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and standard barrel, featuring a flat top rail and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the tan body, black barrel, fixed stock, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, narrow profile, and alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the fixed stock and the straight alignment of the rifle's body.
